response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_status : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Crew
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_surname : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> N : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> N : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> N : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> N : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> N : FK=flight_status_code
REL Flight -> Crew : N -> N : FK=pilot_id
REL Flight -> Crew : N -> N : FK=co_pilot_id
REL Flight -> Crew : N -> N : FK=purser_id
REL Flight -> Crew : N -> N : FK=cabin_crew_id
